case_title: TENDERLOIN NEIGHBOORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION VS. ERIC R. HENNELL et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION IN LIEU OF PERSONAL TESTIMONY RE: LOSS OF ORIGINAL EASE FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN NEIGHBOORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN NEIGHBOORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HENNELL, ERIC R. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 34 TURK STREET, #233, SAN FRANCISCO, CA. 94102, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN NEIGHBOORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT HENNELL, ERIC R. DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN NEIGHBOORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION SERVED DEC-13-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HENNELL, ERIC R.
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT HENNELL, ERIC R.
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT HENNELL, ERIC R.
